name: claude-mcp-tunnel
description: MCP server that detects project frameworks (25+), starts dev servers, and creates public Cloudflare tunnels from a single tool call. Text Claude via Dispatch from your phone and get back a working HTTPS URL accessible from anywhere.

tools.name: scan_ports
tools.description: Scan common dev ports for running servers

tools.name: expose_port
tools.description: Expose a running port via public tunnel, return URL

tools.name: start_and_expose
tools.description: Full pipeline: detect, install deps, start server, tunnel, return URL

tools.name: start_full_stack
tools.description: Start backend + frontend, expose frontend via tunnel

tools.name: stop_tunnels
tools.description: Kill all active tunnels and servers

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Show active tunnels, ports, and URLs
